title: MCP Tool Contract Testing Skill
author: JSONbored
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip -o mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip && unzip -o mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip -d ./mcp-tool-contract-testing

Usage:
Use this skill to define and enforce MCP tool behavior contracts before deploying server updates.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Run the MCP tool contract testing skill on this server update."

# Required output
1) Tool contract matrix
2) Positive/negative test cases
3) Schema compliance report
4) Release go/no-go summary
detailMarkdown:
# MCP Tool Contract Testing Skill

Validate MCP server tools with contract-style tests to catch schema drift, unsafe behavior, and integration regressions early.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: maintainer-built/verified package
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip -o mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip && unzip -o mcp-tool-contract-testing.zip -d ./mcp-tool-contract-testing
```

## Usage
Use this skill to define and enforce MCP tool behavior contracts before deploying server updates.
seoDescription: Reusable AI skill for testing MCP tool contracts, response schemas, and behavior guarantees across updates. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
